content_body: What a beautiful home, and majestic setting! The experience our family enjoyed this Thanksgiving week will long be one of our best! The cabin (beautiful five bedroom home in the mountains) had all we had hoped for: a spectacular view, comfortable rooms and lovely accommodations! We enjoyed everything about Blue Ridge. Many thanks for all you have done to make our stay so special! Thanks to the assistance of Taylor, we will surely recommend, as well as return to Blue Ridge, GA!
title: One of Our Best Thanksgivings!
